hero.title: Human-Centered Access. Deterministic Compliance.
hero.subtitle: We believe the foundation of public benefits access is built at the business rules layer. Applied Policy Systems provides Independent Verification and Validation oversight and architects low-friction, deterministic digital infrastructure, ensuring systems are a verifiable reflection of written law while reducing administrative burden.

challenge.label: Statutory Precision
challenge.title: The Translation Layer.
challenge.text: Public technology fails when system architecture diverges from legislation, exposing agencies to compliance risks and fiscal sanctions. We mitigate this risk by providing Independent Verification and Validation oversight and translating complex regulations into deterministic system logic. This ensures exact policy intent dictates operational behavior, protecting agency budgets from audit findings while reducing the administrative burden placed on residents and frontline caseworkers.
challenge.solution: We ensure system logic is a verifiable reflection of statutory requirements.
challenge.outputsLead: Standard verification artifacts and specialized operational deliverables include:

infrastructure.label: System Integrity
infrastructure.title: High-Fidelity Architecture.
infrastructure.text: We architect secure frameworks for government agencies to deliver complex services with precision, protecting agency budgets and the citizen experience.

sandbox.label: Prototype 01
sandbox.title: Prototype 01: Payload Verification
sandbox.text: An operational prototype demonstrating how to provide residents with immediate, plain-language feedback on evidence requirements while outputting data that is 100% compliant with statutory mandates.

manual.label: Prototype 02
manual.title: Prototype 02: Rules Extraction
manual.text: An operational prototype demonstrating how to transform dense legislative text into an intuitive, plain-language guide that provides caseworkers with a mathematically provable source of truth.

founder.title: Graham O'Neill, Founder & Principal Consultant
founder.intro: Graham O’Neill has over 15 years of experience improving complex government systems.
founder.p1: His career focuses on providing systems oversight and architecting deterministic infrastructure. From municipal revenue operations to federal advisory roles, Graham aligns written regulations with operational realities.
founder.p2: Before founding Applied Policy Systems LLC, Graham held senior leadership positions across all levels of government, specializing in the structural evaluation of benefits access and the implementation of tax administration programs.

m1.title: Systems Architecture
m1.desc: Architects neuro-symbolic rules engine prototypes combining Large Language Models and deterministic logic engines to automate public benefits eligibility calculations and evidence triage, ensuring mathematical accuracy for human adjudicators.

m2.title: State Executive Leadership
m2.desc: Executed the Predictive Benefits Access Initiative, integrating state IT infrastructure with plain language mandates to prevent procedural drop-offs.

m3.title: Data Integration
m3.desc: Architected data-sharing agreements and integration logic for civic tech prototypes to ensure alignment with state IT security parameters.

m4.title: Policy Translation
m4.desc: Operated as a subject matter expert integrating public benefits and tax administration. Directed national policy initiatives and evaluated IRS quality control.

m5.title: Frontline Verification
m5.desc: Conducted direct client application assistance and utilized this engagement to author standard operating procedures and facilitate systemic quality control across multiple state jurisdictions.

m6.title: Federal Advisory
m6.desc: Serves in a concurrent advisory capacity to Congress and the IRS on electronic tax administration, providing subject matter expertise on federal privacy frameworks.

citizen.label: Citizen Benefit
citizen.desc: Tax credits returned to Philadelphia residents through the 'You Earned It Philly' initiative.

funding.label: Modernization Funding
funding.desc: Federal & Philanthropic funding secured for SNAP Payment Error Rate reduction initiatives.

execution.label: Years of Execution
execution.desc: Career dedicated to improving public systems at municipal, state, and federal levels.

ecosystem.label: Civic Tech Network
ecosystem.title: Strategic Collaborations.
ecosystem.desc: Operational expertise and network collaborations of the Principal Consultant.
ecosystem.quote: Applied Policy Systems LLC is built on a foundation of deep professional history. Graham has collaborated with national experts in implementation, evaluation, and design, ensuring our methodology is informed by the civic tech network.

nava.name: Nava PBC
nava.context: Coordinated technical planning for software and real-time dashboards within state benefit systems, focusing on synthetic data environments and statutory verification.

usdr.name: U.S. Digital Response
usdr.context: Managed discovery sprints and root cause analysis to reduce SNAP Payment Error Rates and mitigate recertification churn.

cfa.name: Code for America
cfa.context: Secured operational partnerships to deploy virtual tax software and collaborated on human-centered design for public benefit notices.

arnold.name: Arnold Ventures
arnold.context: Authored proposals for multi-stakeholder data science initiatives, establishing pathways to address SNAP accuracy through predictive modeling.

rfa.name: Results for America
rfa.context: Oversaw randomized controlled trial evaluations for municipal program performance, aligning initiatives with evidence-based policy standards.

prosperity.name: Prosperity Now
prosperity.context: Served as a national policy liaison to the IRS, FDIC, and CFPB, integrating federal tax programs into local financial infrastructure.

cwf.name: Campaign for Working Families
cwf.context: Directed operational partnerships and secured over $2.2 million in grant funding to scale community-based financial services.

civilla.name: Civilla
civilla.context: Applied service design research and digital identity patterns to inform system architecture evaluations and human-centered public benefit forms.

hero.label: Applied Intelligence
hero.title: Empirical Analysis & Systems Architecture.
hero.subtitle: This intelligence serves as the foundational analytical layer for our advisory engagements. We leverage decades of federal oversight data to engineer deterministic compliance frameworks.

per.title: 25-Year SNAP Analysis: State Policy Impacts on Error Rates
per.desc: An applied methodology for evaluating federal Quality Control outcomes across all 53 U.S. jurisdictions from FY 2000 to 2024. Our analysis forensically maps specific state policy implementations against actual Payment Error Rates, Case and Procedural Error Rates, and the 15% state match penalty thresholds under Public Law 119-21.

glassbox.title: Verifiable Payload Architecture: Secure External Data Ingestion
glassbox.desc: An architectural framework defining strict Data Exchange Models and payload validation schemas. This allows third-party applications and interagency portals to securely transmit unstructured resident data into legacy state databases as mathematically verified evidence, reducing applicant friction and maintaining audit compliance.

irc7216.title: Architecting IRS Security Overlays for Cross-Enrollment
irc7216.desc: Technical specifications for bridging the strict privacy requirements of federal tax data under Internal Revenue Code Section 7216 and IRS Publication 1075 with the eligibility logic of primary public benefits programs including MAGI and 7 CFR 273. This framework enables seamless cross-enrollment while satisfying State CISO security strictures.

hero.label: Operational Prototypes
hero.title: Interactive Testing Environments
hero.subtitle: Live demonstrator models illustrating the translation of statutory requirements into deterministic business rules and operational workflows.

documentTool.label: Prototype 01
documentTool.title: Payload Verification Prototype
documentTool.desc: An interactive environment demonstrating the ingestion of unstructured resident data into strict statutory schemas. It shows how to structure evidence triage to reduce applicant friction while maintaining human-in-the-loop audit compliance.

policyManual.label: Prototype 02
policyManual.title: Deterministic Rules Engine
policyManual.desc: An interactive environment demonstrating how Large Language Models and deterministic logic combine to map statutory requirements directly to operational workflows, enabling frontline caseworkers and mitigating state match penalties.

hero.label: Capabilities
hero.title: Systems Architecture & Oversight.

payload.title: Verifiable Payload Architectures
payload.desc: Independent Verification and Validation frameworks that ensure system logic is a verifiable reflection of statutory requirements.

rules.title: Business Rules Engine Architecture
rules.desc: Architectures combining Large Language Models and deterministic logic engines for mathematical accuracy in eligibility triage.

intelligence.title: Federal Sanction Mitigation
intelligence.desc: Leveraging decades of federal oversight data and executive leadership experience to establish mathematical baselines for mitigating state match penalties.

exchange.title: Secure Data Interoperability
exchange.desc: Strict data exchange models and security overlays for interagency data ingestion, including the integration of highly restricted federal tax data.

advisory.title: Pre-Procurement Advisory
advisory.desc: Subject Matter Expert advisory for drafting modernization tenders with absolute policy fidelity.

translation.title: Operational Translation
translation.desc: Converting dense legislative text into plain-language, low-friction digital infrastructure for frontline caseworkers.

sprints.title: Small Procurement Diagnostics
sprints.desc: Targeted system audits executed under delegated agency purchasing thresholds. We rapidly evaluate existing software to identify compliance gaps and fiscal risk.

advisory.title: Enterprise Verification Advisory
advisory.desc: Comprehensive oversight for large-scale technology modernization. We provide Independent Verification and Validation services and draft formal procurement requirements.

integration.title: Prime Contractor Integration
integration.desc: Specialized subcontractor support under existing state and federal Master Service Agreements. We embed policy-to-code expertise directly into prime contractor delivery teams.
